cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are a bunch of partner switches, so I need to track each one step by step. Let me start by listing out the initial pairings. Initially: - Alice is with Helga. - Bob is with Jamie. - Claire is with Ophelia. - Dave is with Karl. - Eve is with Rodrigo. Now, the problem says there are several partner switches. Let me go through each one in order. First switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. So, Eve was with Rodrigo, and Bob was with Jamie. After switching, Eve will be with Jamie, and Bob will be with Rodrigo. Let me update the pairings. After first switch: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Karl - Eve: Jamie Second switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave was with Karl, Claire was with Ophelia.
